source_milestone: R15 Knowledge Base, Agent Identity, Memory, and RACI Foundations

memory_scopes.purpose: Bounded model-only global_governance_memory category for exact refs and evidence-backed context.
memory_scopes.freshness_or_staleness_rule: Use current repo-truth refs; stale chat memory is not evidence.
memory_scopes.compaction_rule: After compaction, reload exact refs listed by this scope.

invalid_state_rules.description: All required R15-005 memory scope categories must be present.
Every memory scope_id must be unique.
Each memory scope must include required fields.
No scope may allow full repo scan by default path or load mode.
No scope may claim implicit memory loading by role name or chat memory.
No role may load all memory without bounded references.
Any runtime memory engine claim fails validation.
Any persistent memory claim fails validation.
Any retrieval engine or vector search claim fails validation.
Any direct agent runtime or true multi-agent execution claim fails validation.
Any RACI implementation claim fails validation; this is memory access mapping only.
Any card re-entry implementation claim fails validation.
Any R16 or successor opening claim fails validation.
Any status posture marking R15-006 or later complete fails validation.

claims: R15-005 defines a machine-checkable agent memory scope model.
R15-005 maps R15-004 role identities to bounded memory scopes without creating a RACI matrix.
non_claims: no actual agents implemented by R15-005
no direct agent access runtime implemented
no classification or re-entry dry run executed
no final R15 proof package complete
